call_1fb03b6fe30547928f42c111.prompt:
I need to edit a file in the user's Obsidian vault. The task is to add a Chinese translation after an English quote in the note.

**File path:** D:\obsidian\repository\第一次实验\学习笔记\HTTP打怪升级手册.md

**What to do:** Find the blockquote on line 49 that reads:
```
> "All REST interactions are stateless. That is, each request contains all of the information necessary for a connector to understand the request, independent of any requests that may have preceded it."
```

And change it to:
```
> "All REST interactions are stateless. That is, each request contains all of the information necessary for a connector to understand the request, independent of any requests that may have preceded it."
>
> **译文**：所有的 REST 交互都是无状态的。也就是说，每一个请求都包含了连接器理解该请求所需的全部信息，而不依赖于此前可能已经发生的任何请求。
```

Make sure to preserve the empty line and "这意味着：" text that follows after.

Use the Read tool first to read the file, then use Edit to make the change.

toolCalls.name: Read

input.file_path: D:\obsidian\repository\第一次实验\学习笔记\HTTP打怪升级手册.md

toolCalls.result:
45	> 想象一个服务员有严重的失忆症。你第一次跟他说"我要一杯咖啡"，他记下来送到厨房，做好端给你。然后你再说"加一份三明治"，他已经不记得你点了咖啡——你必须重新说"我要一杯咖啡和一份三明治"。每次对话都是全新的，这就是 HTTP 的无状态特性。
46	
47	RFC 9110 Section 9.2.1 明确指出：
48	
49	> "All REST interactions are stateless. That is, each request contains all of the information necessary for a connector to understand the request, independent of any requests that may have preceded it."
50	
51	这意味着：
52	- 服务器不记住客户端的之前请求
53	- 如果需要状态管理，需借助 Cookie、Session、Token 等机制
54	- 无状态设计使得服务器可以并行处理请求，提高可扩展性
55	
56	### 端口
57	
58	| 协议 | 默认端口 | 说明 |
59	|------|---------|------|
